title: Integrate WorldEngine with New Event Bus Architecture
description: The existing WorldEngine in src/simulation/environment/world_engine.py has its own event system. It needs to be integrated with the new EventBus from src/core/events.py so that simulation events flow through the same bus as Avatar/Aide signals.
integration_points: Replace WorldEngine's internal event queue with EventBus from src.core.events
Map WorldEngine's EventType enum to corresponding SignalType values
Ensure WorldEngine emits ENVIRONMENT_CHANGED, NPC_INTERACTION, CONSEQUENCE_APPLIED signals
Add entity registration for Avatars, Aides, and NPCs
Support parallel execution of multiple Avatar-Aide pairs in the same world
